corrections.text: The article presents "Our model, RLM-Qwen3-8B, outperforms the underlying Qwen3-8B model by a median of 28.3% across the four evaluation tasks" as a single direct quote from the arXiv paper. The paper's abstract reads "outperforms the underlying Qwen3-8B model by a median of 28%"; the figure "28.3% across the four evaluation tasks" appears separately in the paper body. The 28.3% value is accurate and sourced to the arXiv paper, but the quoted sentence stitches wording from the abstract and the body rather than reproducing either verbatim.
